testcase.name: test_create_appointment_returns_saved_object

failure.message: AssertionError: id must be present assert None + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7cd31ca83400>('id') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7cd31ca83400> = {'_id': '6a48d01c248a1798ab3007be', 'name': 'TEST_Maria Silva', 'email': 'test_maria@example.pt', 'phone': '+351 912 345 678', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/backend_test.py:43: in test_create_appointment_returns_saved_object assert data.get("id"), "id must be present" E AssertionError: id must be present E assert None E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7cd31ca83400>('id') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0x7cd31ca83400> = {'_id': '6a48d01c248a1798ab3007be', 'name': 'TEST_Maria Silva', 'email': 'test_maria@example.pt', 'phone': '+351 912 345 678', ...}.get

testcase.name: test_list_appointments_contains_created
